name: enigmagent-vault
description: Resolve {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens in prompts using the local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault. Your LLM never sees real API keys.
author: Francisco Angulo de Lafuente

input.label: Vault URL
input.description: Base URL of the EnigmAgent REST API (start with: enigmagent-mcp --mode rest --port 3737 --vault ./vault.json).

input.label: Origin (for domain-binding)
input.description: Origin URL sent with each resolve request. Must match the secret's bound domain.
